name: Okta - sign-on / access policy rules (Zero Trust policy register)
description: Inbound connector: ingests Okta sign-on / authentication policy rules into XCOMPLIANCE.ZTPOLICY - the Zero Trust policy register (NIST SP 800-207 Policy Engine view) behind the /zero-trust Automation & Governance pillars. Normalizes each rule to subject x resource x conditions x grant controls (require factor -> MFA, DENY -> block) and state (active | inactive). Modes: `file` (an exported policy-rules JSON array), `live` (Okta /api/v1/policies + /rules with an org URL + API token), or `demo`. Read-only against Okta. Config: OKTA_URL + OKTA_TOKEN (or pass org / token). Idempotent by rule id.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path to an exported Okta policy-rules JSON (an array of rule objects). A demo sample is used if omitted and no token is set.

parameters.name: org
parameters.help: Okta org base URL, e.g. https://acme.okta.com (overrides OKTA_URL)

parameters.name: token
parameters.help: Okta API token (SSWS) (overrides OKTA_TOKEN) for live /api/v1/policies + /rules

parameters.name: type
parameters.help: Okta policy type to pull (OKTA_SIGN_ON | ACCESS_POLICY)
